main.c(3) Library Functions Manual main.c(3)

NAME

main.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int acds_main (void)
ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point.

Function Documentation

int acds_main (void )

ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point. Expects options already parsed and shared initialization complete. Called by main.c mode dispatcher after options_init() and asciichat_shared_init().

Returns

Exit code (0 = success, non-zero = error)

Definition at line 86 of file discovery-service/main.c.

86                     {
87   asciichat_error_t result;
88 
89   // Handle keepawake: check for mutual exclusivity and apply mode default
90   // Discovery-service default: keepawake DISABLED (use --keepawake to enable)
91   if (GET_OPTION(enable_keepawake) && GET_OPTION(disable_keepawake)) {
92     log_error("--keepawake and --no-keepawake are mutually exclusive");
93     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
94   }
95   if (GET_OPTION(enable_keepawake)) {
96     (void)platform_enable_keepawake();
97   }
98 
99   // Increase file descriptor limit for many concurrent connections
100 #ifdef __linux__
101   struct rlimit rl = {.rlim_cur = 65536, .rlim_max = 65536};
102   if (setrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE, &rl) < 0) {
103     log_warn("couldn't raise fd limit: %s", strerror(errno));
104   }
105 #elif defined(__APPLE__)
106   struct rlimit rl = {.rlim_cur = 10240, .rlim_max = RLIM_INFINITY};
107   setrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE, &rl);
108 #endif
109 
110   // Options already parsed and shared initialization complete (done by main.c)
111   const options_t *opts = options_get();
112 
113   log_info("ascii-chat Discovery Service (acds) starting...");
114   log_info("Version: %s (%s, %s)", ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_FULL, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_TYPE, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_DATE);
115 
116   // Initialize session string generator (libsodium)
117   result = acds_string_init();
118   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
119     log_error("Failed to initialize session string generator");
120     return result;
121   }
122 
123   // Load or generate identity keys
124   uint8_t public_key[32];
125   uint8_t secret_key[64];
126 
127   const char *acds_key_path = GET_OPTION(encrypt_key);
128   // If no key provided, use default path in config directory
129   char default_key_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH] = {0};
130   if (!acds_key_path || acds_key_path[0] == '\0') {
131     const char *config_dir = get_config_dir();
132     if (config_dir) {
133       safe_snprintf(default_key_path, sizeof(default_key_path), "%sdiscovery_identity", config_dir);
134       acds_key_path = default_key_path;
135     }
136   }
137   log_info("Loading identity key from %s", acds_key_path);
138   result = acds_identity_load(acds_key_path, public_key, secret_key);
139 
140   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
141     log_info("Identity key not found, generating new key...");
142 
143     result = acds_identity_generate(public_key, secret_key);
144     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
145       log_error("Failed to generate identity key");
146       return result;
147     }
148 
149     result = acds_identity_save(acds_key_path, public_key, secret_key);
150     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
151       log_error("Failed to save identity key to %s", acds_key_path);
152       return result;
153     }
154 
155     log_info("Saved new identity key to %s", acds_key_path);
156   }
157 
158   // Display server fingerprint
159   char fingerprint[65];
160   acds_identity_fingerprint(public_key, fingerprint);
161   log_info("Discovery server identity: SHA256:%s", fingerprint);
162   char msg[256];
163   safe_snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "🔑 Server fingerprint: SHA256:%s", fingerprint);
164   log_console(LOG_INFO, msg);
165 
166   // Create config from options for server initialization
167   acds_config_t config;
168   // Read validated port option (discovery-service listens on 'port', not 'acds_port')
169   int port_num = GET_OPTION(port);
170   if (port_num < 1 || port_num > 65535) {
171     log_error("Invalid port: %d (must be 1-65535)", port_num);
172     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
173   }
174   config.port = port_num;
175 
176   const char *address = opts && opts->address[0] != '\0' ? opts->address : "127.0.0.1";
177   const char *address6 = opts && opts->address6[0] != '\0' ? opts->address6 : "::1";
178   const char *log_file = opts && opts->log_file[0] != '\0' ? opts->log_file : "acds.log";
179   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.address, address, sizeof(config.address));
180   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.address6, address6, sizeof(config.address6));
181   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.database_path, GET_OPTION(discovery_database_path), sizeof(config.database_path));
182   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.key_path, acds_key_path, sizeof(config.key_path));
183   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.log_file, log_file, sizeof(config.log_file));
184   config.log_level = GET_OPTION(log_level);
185   config.require_server_identity = GET_OPTION(require_server_identity) != 0;
186   config.require_client_identity = GET_OPTION(require_client_identity) != 0;
187 
188   // Log security policy
189   if (config.require_server_identity) {
190     log_info("Security: Requiring signed identity from servers creating sessions");
191   }
192   if (config.require_client_identity) {
193     log_info("Security: Requiring signed identity from clients joining sessions");
194   }
195 
196   // Parse STUN servers from comma-separated list
197   config.stun_count = 0;
198   memset(config.stun_servers, 0, sizeof(config.stun_servers));
199   const char *stun_servers_str = GET_OPTION(stun_servers);
200   if (stun_servers_str && stun_servers_str[0] != '\0') {
201     char stun_copy[OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE];
202     SAFE_STRNCPY(stun_copy, stun_servers_str, sizeof(stun_copy));
203 
204     char *saveptr = NULL;
205     char *token = platform_strtok_r(stun_copy, ",", &saveptr);
206     while (token && config.stun_count < 4) {
207       // Trim whitespace
208       while (*token == ' ' || *token == '\t')
209         token++;
210       size_t len = strlen(token);
211       while (len > 0 && (token[len - 1] == ' ' || token[len - 1] == '\t')) {
212         token[--len] = '\0';
213       }
214 
215       if (len > 0 && len < sizeof(config.stun_servers[0].host)) {
216         config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host_len = (uint8_t)len;
217         SAFE_STRNCPY(config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host, token,
218                      sizeof(config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host));
219         log_info("Added STUN server: %s", token);
220         config.stun_count++;
221       } else if (len > 0) {
222         log_warn("STUN server URL too long (max 63 chars): %s", token);
223       }
224 
225       token = platform_strtok_r(NULL, ",", &saveptr);
226     }
227   }
228 
229   // Parse TURN servers from comma-separated list
230   config.turn_count = 0;
231   memset(config.turn_servers, 0, sizeof(config.turn_servers));
232   const char *turn_servers_str = GET_OPTION(turn_servers);
233   const char *turn_username_str = GET_OPTION(turn_username);
234   const char *turn_credential_str = GET_OPTION(turn_credential);
235 
236   if (turn_servers_str && turn_servers_str[0] != '\0') {
237     char turn_copy[OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE];
238     SAFE_STRNCPY(turn_copy, turn_servers_str, sizeof(turn_copy));
239 
240     char *saveptr = NULL;
241     char *token = platform_strtok_r(turn_copy, ",", &saveptr);
242     while (token && config.turn_count < 4) {
243       // Trim whitespace
244       while (*token == ' ' || *token == '\t')
245         token++;
246       size_t len = strlen(token);
247       while (len > 0 && (token[len - 1] == ' ' || token[len - 1] == '\t')) {
248         token[--len] = '\0';
249       }
250 
251       if (len > 0 && len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].url)) {
252         config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url_len = (uint8_t)len;
253         SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url, token,
254                      sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url));
255 
256         // Set username if provided
257         if (turn_username_str && turn_username_str[0] != '\0') {
258           size_t username_len = strlen(turn_username_str);
259           if (username_len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].username)) {
260             config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username_len = (uint8_t)username_len;
261             SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username, turn_username_str,
262                          sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username));
263           }
264         }
265 
266         // Set credential if provided
267         if (turn_credential_str && turn_credential_str[0] != '\0') {
268           size_t credential_len = strlen(turn_credential_str);
269           if (credential_len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].credential)) {
270             config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential_len = (uint8_t)credential_len;
271             SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential, turn_credential_str,
272                          sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential));
273           }
274         }
275 
276         log_info("Added TURN server: %s (username: %s)", token,
277                  turn_username_str && turn_username_str[0] ? turn_username_str : "<none>");
278         config.turn_count++;
279       } else if (len > 0) {
280         log_warn("TURN server URL too long (max 63 chars): %s", token);
281       }
282 
283       token = platform_strtok_r(NULL, ",", &saveptr);
284     }
285   }
286 
287   // Copy TURN secret for dynamic credential generation
288   const char *turn_secret_str = GET_OPTION(turn_secret);
289   if (turn_secret_str && turn_secret_str[0] != '\0') {
290     SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_secret, turn_secret_str, sizeof(config.turn_secret));
291     log_info("TURN dynamic credential generation enabled");
292   } else {
293     config.turn_secret[0] = '\0';
294   }
295 
296   // Initialize server
297   acds_server_t server;
298   memset(&server, 0, sizeof(server));
299   g_server = &server;
300 
301   result = acds_server_init(&server, &config);
302   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
303     log_error("Server initialization failed");
304     g_server = NULL;
305     return result;
306   }
307 
308   // Initialize WebSocket server (for browser clients)
309   websocket_server_config_t ws_config = {
310       .port = GET_OPTION(websocket_port),
311       .client_handler = acds_websocket_client_handler,
312       .user_data = &server,
313       .tls_cert_path = GET_OPTION(websocket_tls_cert),
314       .tls_key_path = GET_OPTION(websocket_tls_key),
315   };
316 
317   memset(&g_websocket_server, 0, sizeof(g_websocket_server));
318   asciichat_error_t ws_init_result = websocket_server_init(&g_websocket_server, &ws_config);
319   if (ws_init_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
320     log_warn("Failed to initialize WebSocket server - browser clients will not be supported");
321   } else {
322     log_info("WebSocket server initialized on port %d", GET_OPTION(websocket_port));
323     // Start WebSocket event loop in background thread (services lws callbacks)
324     if (asciichat_thread_create(&g_ws_thread, "websocket_event_loop", websocket_server_thread_wrapper,
325                                 &g_websocket_server) == 0) {
326       g_ws_thread_started = true;
327       log_info("WebSocket event loop thread started");
328     } else {
329       log_error("Failed to start WebSocket event loop thread");
330     }
331   }
332 
333   // Initialize status tracking variables
334   g_discovery_start_time = time(NULL);
335   g_last_status_update = g_discovery_start_time;
336 
337   // Check if shutdown was requested during initialization
338   if (acds_should_exit()) {
339     log_info("Shutdown signal received during initialization, skipping server startup");
340     return 0;
341   }
342 
343   // =========================================================================
344   // UPnP Port Mapping (Quick Win for Direct TCP)
345   // =========================================================================
346   // Try to open port via UPnP so direct TCP works for ~70% of home users.
347   // If this fails, clients fall back to WebRTC automatically - not fatal.
348   //
349   // Strategy:
350   //   1. UPnP (works on ~90% of home routers)
351   //   2. NAT-PMP fallback (Apple routers)
352   //   3. If both fail: use ACDS + WebRTC (reliable, but slightly higher latency)
353 
354   // Check again before expensive UPnP initialization (might timeout trying to reach router)
355   if (acds_should_exit()) {
356     log_info("Shutdown signal received before UPnP initialization");
357     result = ASCIICHAT_OK;
358     goto cleanup_resources;
359   }
360 
361   if (GET_OPTION(enable_upnp)) {
362     asciichat_error_t upnp_result = nat_upnp_open(config.port, "ascii-chat ACDS", &g_upnp_ctx);
363 
364     if (upnp_result == ASCIICHAT_OK && g_upnp_ctx) {
365       char public_addr[22];
366       if (nat_upnp_get_address(g_upnp_ctx, public_addr, sizeof(public_addr)) == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
367         char msg[256];
368         safe_snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "🌐 Public endpoint: %s (direct TCP)", public_addr);
369         log_console(LOG_INFO, msg);
370         log_info("UPnP: Port mapping successful, public endpoint: %s", public_addr);
371       }
372     } else {
373       log_info("UPnP: Port mapping unavailable or failed - will use WebRTC fallback");
374       log_console(LOG_INFO, "📡 Clients behind strict NATs will use WebRTC fallback");
375     }
376   } else {
377     log_debug("UPnP: Disabled (use --upnp to enable automatic port mapping)");
378   }
379 
380   // Check if shutdown was requested before initializing mDNS
381   if (acds_should_exit()) {
382     log_info("Shutdown signal received before mDNS initialization");
383     result = ASCIICHAT_OK;
384     goto cleanup_resources;
385   }
386 
387   // Initialize mDNS for LAN discovery of ACDS server
388   // This allows clients on the local network to discover the discovery service itself
389 
390   log_debug("Initializing mDNS for ACDS LAN service discovery...");
391   g_mdns_ctx = asciichat_mdns_init();
392   if (!g_mdns_ctx) {
393     LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET("Failed to initialize mDNS (non-fatal, LAN discovery disabled)");
394     log_warn("mDNS disabled for ACDS - LAN discovery of discovery service will not be available");
395   } else {
396     // Advertise ACDS service on the LAN
397     // Build hostname if available
398     char hostname[256] = {0};
399     gethostname(hostname, sizeof(hostname) - 1);
400 
401     asciichat_mdns_service_t service = {
402         .name = "ascii-chat-Discovery-Service",
403         .type = "_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp",
404         .host = hostname,
405         .port = config.port,
406         .txt_records = NULL,
407         .txt_count = 0,
408     };
409 
410     asciichat_error_t mdns_advertise_result = asciichat_mdns_advertise(g_mdns_ctx, &service);
411     if (mdns_advertise_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
412       LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET("Failed to advertise ACDS mDNS service");
413       log_warn("mDNS advertising failed for ACDS - LAN discovery disabled");
414       asciichat_mdns_destroy(g_mdns_ctx);
415       g_mdns_ctx = NULL;
416     } else {
417       log_console(LOG_INFO, "🌐 mDNS: ACDS advertised as '_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp.local' on LAN");
418       log_info("mDNS: ACDS advertised as '_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp.local' (port=%d)", config.port);
419     }
420   }
421 
422   // Install signal handlers for clean shutdown
423 #ifndef _WIN32
424   // Use sigaction with explicit flags to disable SA_RESTART - this ensures
425   // select() returns EINTR instead of restarting, so the shutdown flag can be checked
426   struct sigaction sa = {
427     .sa_handler = acds_handle_signal,
428     .sa_flags = 0  // No SA_RESTART - we want select() to return EINTR on signal
429   };
430   sigemptyset(&sa.sa_mask);
431   sigaction(SIGINT, &sa, NULL);
432   sigaction(SIGTERM, &sa, NULL);
433 #else
434   signal(SIGINT, acds_handle_signal);
435   signal(SIGTERM, acds_handle_signal);
436 #endif
437 
438 
439   // Run server
440   result = acds_server_run(&server);
441   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
442     log_error("Server run failed");
443   }
444 
445 cleanup_resources:
446   // Cleanup
447   // Disable keepawake before exit
448   platform_disable_keepawake();
449 
450   log_info("Shutting down discovery server...");
451   acds_server_shutdown(&server);
452   g_server = NULL;
453 
454   // Stop and join WebSocket event loop thread
455   if (g_ws_thread_started) {
456     atomic_store_bool(&g_websocket_server.running, false);
457     websocket_server_cancel_service(&g_websocket_server);
458     int join_result = asciichat_thread_join_timeout(&g_ws_thread, NULL, 500 * NS_PER_MS_INT);
459     if (join_result != 0) {
460       log_warn("WebSocket event loop thread did not exit within 500ms");
461     }
462     g_ws_thread_started = false;
463   }
464   websocket_server_destroy(&g_websocket_server);
465   log_debug("WebSocket server destroyed");
466 
467   // Clean up UPnP port mapping
468   if (g_upnp_ctx) {
469     nat_upnp_close(&g_upnp_ctx);
470     log_debug("UPnP port mapping closed");
471   }
472 
473   // Clean up mDNS context
474   if (g_mdns_ctx) {
475     asciichat_mdns_destroy(g_mdns_ctx);
476     g_mdns_ctx = NULL;
477     log_debug("mDNS context shut down");
478   }
479 
480   log_info("Discovery server stopped");
481   return result;
482 }




References acds_identity_fingerprint(),
    acds_identity_generate(), acds_identity_load(),
    acds_identity_save(), acds_server_init(),
    acds_server_run(), acds_server_shutdown(),
    acds_string_init(), acds_websocket_client_handler(),
    acds_config_t::address, options_state::address,
    acds_config_t::address6, options_state::address6,
    ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_DATE, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_TYPE,
    ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_FULL, asciichat_mdns_advertise(),
    asciichat_mdns_destroy(), asciichat_mdns_init(),
    ASCIICHAT_OK, asciichat_thread_create(),
    asciichat_thread_join_timeout(), atomic_store_bool(),
    acds_config_t::database_path, errno,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, get_config_dir(), GET_OPTION,
    acds_config_t::key_path, log_console, log_debug,
    LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET, log_error, acds_config_t::log_file,
    log_file, options_state::log_file, LOG_INFO,
    log_info, acds_config_t::log_level, log_warn,
    nat_upnp_close(), nat_upnp_get_address(),
    nat_upnp_open(), NS_PER_MS_INT, OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE,
    options_get(), platform_disable_keepawake(),
    platform_enable_keepawake(), PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH,
    platform_strtok_r(), acds_config_t::port,
    acds_config_t::require_client_identity,
    acds_config_t::require_server_identity, safe_snprintf(),
    SAFE_STRNCPY, acds_config_t::stun_count,
    acds_config_t::stun_servers, acds_config_t::turn_count,
    acds_config_t::turn_secret, acds_config_t::turn_servers,
    websocket_server_cancel_service(), websocket_server_destroy(),
    and websocket_server_init().








Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.9.19
    ascii-chat
